<!--
Thank you for contributing to Haneoka. Read CONTRIBUTING.md before opening a
substantial change, and keep this pull request limited to one reviewable
outcome. Text inside comments will not appear in the submitted description.
-->

## Purpose

<!--
Explain the user or maintainer problem this pull request addresses and why the
change belongs in Haneoka. Keep unrelated work in separate pull requests.
-->

## Changes

<!-- Describe the observable result and the important implementation decisions. -->

## Related issue

<!--
Use "Closes #123" when this PR resolves an issue. For a small, self-contained
correction with no issue, write "None — <reason>".
-->

## Verification

<!--
List the exact commands and manual scenarios you actually ran, with their
results. CI runs pnpm typecheck, pnpm lint, and pnpm build. Explain any relevant
check you could not run; do not report an unrun check as passing.
-->

-

## Visual evidence

<!--
For visible changes, add before/after screenshots or a recording and include
the browser, OS, device, viewport/orientation, route, and resource server.
Delete this section when the change has no visible effect.
-->

## Compatibility and operations

<!--
Describe breaking behavior, schema or data migration, resource identity,
Cloudflare/R2/deployment impact, fallback behavior, and rollback steps only
when relevant. Delete this section when none apply.
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused, and unrelated refactors or generated outputs are separate.
- [ ] The verification section reports every relevant check I ran and explains important omissions.
- [ ] User-facing documentation and all affected locale catalogs are updated when applicable.
- [ ] No credential, authorization value, private package, restricted payload, generated release data, or personal data is included.
- [ ] New or adapted code, dependencies, and assets retain their source, license, file notice, and third-party notice when applicable.
